summary: Verification testing for 2 bug fixes from iteration_27. Both fixes confirmed working: 1) Location pages now use NEW benchmark design (static folders deleted), 2) Case Studies API returns project data (fallback to 'projects' collection). All 5 page types tested and passing.

locations_api.response: Returns enriched location data with feature_cards, faqs, brands
